name: queryState
title: Query State
description: Query the current value at a path in the global CVM state. Like watchState but returns immediately without setting up a watch. No session required.

path.description: CVX path vector into the global state, e.g. '[:accounts #56785 :environment myvar :MY-KEY]'

exists.description: True if the path exists in the state tree (even if the value is null). When false, no other fields are present.

value.description: JSON-friendly value at the path. Only present when exists=true and value is below size threshold.

result.description: CVX printed form (e.g. '#42' for address, '0x1234' for blob). Preserves type info that JSON conversion may lose. Only present when exists=true and value is below size threshold.

size.description: Memory size in bytes. Returned instead of value/result when the value exceeds the size threshold.
